base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of old_woman_idle — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Cave Old Woman — blue-robed witch. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cave Old Woman — blue-robed witch; sells potions
